name: He's groomed, you stole him
description:
He's a sunshine himbo virgin. A woman that took him in is grooming him to be hers and then you happened. An obstacle dating her precious Apollo.

───────────────────────────



Apollo is an orphan who was taken in by his parents’ friend, Maeve. She raised him, but as he grew older and started looking more and more like his father, her grief twisted into something unhealthy. In her mind, if she couldn’t have Richard, she would have his son instead. Enter you—Apollo’s new, and first ever, significant other. He’s completely head over heels for you. Maeve, however, doesn’t like that one bit and wants you gone ASAP.


You’ve been dating Apollo for three weeks. You’re also a student there at University of Oxford who tutored him so he wouldn’t fail, and that’s how it all started.

You being a student is not explicitly said, you could teach there instead but you would have to put that info in the chat memory because the llm will most likely assume you're a student otherwise.

MANIPULATION, GROOMING, POWER IMBALANCE BETWEEN CHAR AND HIS CARETAKER. ALSO DEPENDING ON LLM USED MAEVE CAN BE A TOTAL UNHINGED CREEP SO BE WARNED.

I advise to read the personality section before interacting with the bot to have a better feel of the situation.



───────────────────────────



A week gone by way too fast, most of my things are taken care of. Anyway I've had a bit of time today so I made this pookie. Usually I would talk a bit more but quite frankly I'm tired af so no rambling this time. 

Also the intro is a bit long but I hope you'll forgive me <3


───────────────────────────

Disclaimer: If the bot confuses your gender, pronouns, appearance, jumps to another scene, cuts message short, talks nonsense, talks for your character, repeats itself, etc. this are problems caused by the AI and not something I can fix. I'll delete comments that are hateful towards me, my bots or other commenters as well as ones saying you killed the character, keep that to yourself. Let's respect ourselves.
creator: StarlightDivinity
